relations.subject: Grand rhabdornis
relations.evidence: It is found in the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park actual protection from habitat loss and deforestation is lax

relations.subject: Grand rhabdornis
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical mid-elevation and high elevation montane forest. The International Union for Conservation of Nature lists it as a Least-concern species but despite this the population is still said to be declining due to habitat loss and fragmentation from illegal logging, land conversion, slash-and-burn farming and mining
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
